meaning: 大阪[日本本州岛西南岸港市]
examples: There are also two other Japanese cities that have made the top 10 list this year: Osaka and Nagoya.
Nishinomiya is a city located between Osaka and Kobe.
My brother and I moved to Osaka for university.
By contrast, the evidence of the Tokyo-Osaka route is of continuing, ever heavier industrial investment.
Then he or she might usefully ride the bullet train from Tokyo to Osaka.
